user.title: WiFi Geolocation backends
user.description: Set a priority number for each backend you want to enable (1 = tried first); leave at 0 to disable. They're tried in ascending priority order until one resolves a location.

data.mozilla_api_key: API key (leave blank if your instance doesn't require one)
data.mozilla_base_url: Ichnaea base URL (Mozilla's public instance was shut down in 2024 -- point this at a self-hosted Ichnaea instance)

error.no_backend_selected: Enable at least one backend (set its priority above 0).

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one WiFi Geolocation configuration is allowed.

init.title: WiFi Geolocation backends
init.description: Change which backend(s) are enabled and/or their priority number (1 = tried first, 0 = disabled). Backends that stay enabled keep their existing credentials; newly-enabled ones will prompt for credentials next.

data.mozilla_api_key: API key (leave blank if your instance doesn't require one)
data.mozilla_base_url: Ichnaea base URL (Mozilla's public instance was shut down in 2024 -- point this at a self-hosted Ichnaea instance)

error.no_backend_selected: Enable at least one backend (set its priority above 0).
